issue_title: Scrollbar makes content too wide when it appears in v. 7.2.0
issue_body_preview:
#### Reproduction
It's also reproduced on example https://stackblitz.com/edit/ngx-scrollbar

Steps to reproduce:
1. Just open scrollbar
 
 
#### Expected Behavior

What behavior were you expecting to see?
![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/40790510/74632665-8bac6080-5168-11
test_description_zh: 打开包含 ngx-scrollbar 组件的页面，观察页面内容区域的宽度以及是否出现多余的水平滚动条。
expected_result_zh: 滚动条正常显示时，内容区域宽度应正确适配容器，不会因滚动条出现而导致内容变宽或产生不必要的水平滚动条。
